ddls:
CREATE TABLE "editors" (
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each editor */,
  "editor_name" TEXT /* Name of the editor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the editor */,
  "version" TEXT /* Current version of the editor */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the editor */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the editor */,
  "pricing" TEXT /* Pricing information of the editor */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Supported operating systems */,
  "system_requirements" TEXT /* System requirements for the editor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("editor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., WYSIWYG, FTP Upload, WebDAV Upload) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the feature */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the feature (e.g., editing, uploading, collaboration) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "editor_features" (
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the editor */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "supported" INTEGER /* Whether the feature is supported by the editor */,
  "supported_since" TEXT /* Date since the feature has been supported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("editor_id", "feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the editor being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "edited" INTEGER /* Whether the review has been edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_editor_id FOREIGN KEY ("editor_id") REFERENCES editors ("editor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the editor being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature being rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_editor_id FOREIGN KEY ("editor_id") REFERENCES editors ("editor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the editor being given feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the feedback */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature being given feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_editor_id FOREIGN KEY ("editor_id") REFERENCES editors ("editor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discussions" (
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discussion */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who started the discussion */,
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the editor being discussed */,
  "discussion_text" TEXT /* Text of the discussion */,
  "discussion_date" TEXT /* Date the discussion was started */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discussion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussions_editor_id FOREIGN KEY ("editor_id") REFERENCES editors ("editor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discussion being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "edited" INTEGER /* Whether the comment has been edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_discussion_id FOREIGN KEY ("discussion_id") REFERENCES discussions ("discussion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being replied to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the reply */,
  "reply_text" TEXT /* Text of the reply */,
  "reply_date" TEXT /* Date the reply was made */,
  "edited" INTEGER /* Whether the reply has been edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the administrator (hashed for security) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the administrator */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the administrator joined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the administrator receiving the notification */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "read" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES admin ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "editor_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the editor being updated */,
  "update_text" TEXT /* Text of the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_editor_updates_editor_id FOREIGN KEY ("editor_id") REFERENCES editors ("editor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_badges" (
  "badge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each badge */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who earned the badge */,
  "badge_name" TEXT /* Name of the badge */,
  "badge_description" TEXT /* Description of the badge */,
  "earned_date" TEXT /* Date the badge was earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("badge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_badges_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "editor_downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download */,
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the editor being downloaded */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date the editor was downloaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who downloaded the editor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_editor_downloads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_editor_downloads_editor_id FOREIGN KEY ("editor_id") REFERENCES editors ("editor_id")
)
